framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.note: 停火D22; 4/18 IRGC攻击4+商船+海峡停摆, 4/22伊朗扣押船只, 4/24 CENTCOM拦截伊朗油轮; 美/以空袭'无显著动作'(late Apr); IRGC对美军直接攻击近零; 主要为海上选择性执法

ceasefire extended indefinitely 4/21 holding; last kinetic IRGC strike was 4/18 vessel attacks in Hormuz; blockade-related vessel redirects (37 since start, 4/24 tanker intercept) ongoing but US-side, not IRGC kinetic
停火D22; 4/26-29 IRGC对美直接攻击近零, 4/24 CENTCOM拦截伊朗集装箱船+37艘船redirect, 4/26-28 IRGC仍扣押MSC Francesca/Epaminondas; Araghchi 4/26赴Islamabad谈'海峡新法律体制'+战争赔偿+不再被攻击保证, 但未提核; ceasefire indef extended 4/21仍holding

停火D9 (4/21 indef extended) 仍holding; 4/26-28 IRGC仍扣MSC Francesca/Epaminondas; 4/24 CENTCOM拦截伊朗油轮; 4/25 redirect累计37艘船; IRGC kinetic strike自4/18后近零, 但海上对峙=US-blockade驱动不算IRGC主动

停火D22(4/8生效, 4/21无限期延长仍持续); IRGC直接对美军攻击近零; 商船选择性扣押+海峡执法持续(MSC Francesca/Epaminondas); CENTCOM自4/13封锁起已重定向37艘伊朗/相关船只; CENTCOM司令Brad Cooper今日(4/30)向Trump汇报'short and powerful'打击新方案; War Powers 60天May 1到期
ceasefire D+22, IRGC enforcing Hormuz closure, ~2-5 seizure/interdiction/week, no active cross-border strikes
4月8日停火后IRGC直接袭击基本归零；4月21日Trump宣布无限期延长停火；偶有违规，双方均有小规模交火。战争活跃期(2/28-4/8)首24小时62波次。
停火D23(4/8生效4/21无限期延长); IRGC主动攻击近零; 仍对商船执行海峡选择性执法扣押(MSC系列); 4月29日20艘过境(非IRGC攻击); War Powers 60天5/1到期
停火后袭击降90%；停火期间小规模违反，IRGC仍控制海峡
两国ceasefire自4/8延续，IRGC仍控制海峡通行+扣押商船，CENTCOM已准备新一轮打击方案但尚未执行

q3_spr_release_rate.label: SPR实际释放速率(mbd)
q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.note: EIA: 近2周周提取超4M桶; SPR库存409.2-413.3M桶(多十年低位); 4/10第二批8.48M桶贷款已发(Gunvor/Phillips66/Trafigura/Macquarie); 计划172M/120天=1.43M/d; 实际低于计划
DOE 4/10 loaned 8.48 Mbbl (second batch); weekly withdrawals >4 Mbbl over past two weeks; SPR ~409-413 Mbbl near multi-decade low; next EIA WPSR 4/29
近2周周提取>4M桶 (Apr 24 BOE报道); SPR 409.2M桶(4/10) -44% vs 2009峰; 计划速率1.43M/d (172M/120d); 实际低于计划; 下一WPSR今日4/29 ~10:30 ET发布
Apr17库存405.0M(周降4.2M); Apr10已贷出8.48M给四家油商; 加速释放
近2周周提取>4M桶(BOE 4/24); SPR约409.2M(4/10数据)-413.3M桶, 多十年低; DOE 4/10第二批8.48M贷给四家油商; 计划172M/年=约1.43M/d; 实际仍低于计划; EIA WPSR 4/29应已发布最新数
4/24报告: 过去两周SPR提取>4M桶; SPR库存4/10为409.2M桶, 4月底~413M桶接近多十年低点; DOE 4/10向4家油企贷出8.48M桶(第二批); 全年计划释放172M桶, IEA协调32国共释放400M桶
172M barrel IEA coordinated release (Mar11); initial 45.2M awards over 120d; half loaned; SPR at ~415M bbl; EIA projects SPR increase via premium returns
当周(截至4月24日)单周释放710万桶，为2022年10月以来最高单周量。SPR当前库存397.9M桶。总计划172M桶/120天≈1.43M/天，IEA协调全球400M桶行动。
当周(截至4/24)单周释放7.1M桶,为2022年10月以来最高; SPR库存397.9M桶; 总计划172M/120天; IEA协调全球400M桶行动; 汽油全国均价.30/加仑
4月24日当周释放7.1M桶(单周最高)；SPR存量397.9M桶；计划总释172M桶/120天
4/24当周释放7.1MB(本轮最高)，总释放17.5MB since March，SPR库存397.9MB，172MB计划进行中

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.findings: envoy Zhai Jun regional tour; Wang Yi 26 calls; China-Pakistan 5-pt proposal Mar31; vetoed UN Hormuz escort resolution Apr7; US intel: China preparing MANPAD shipment to Iran (denied); US seized MV Touska Apr19 carrying dual-use equip from China

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: CENTCOM requested Dark Eagle hypersonic (only 8 exist, never deployed) — IRGC moved launchers beyond reach during ceasefire; simultaneously: ceasefire extended indef Apr21; US blockading Iranian ports since Apr13; Trump May1: 'blast them or make a deal'

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Iran new proposal May1: defers nuclear, offers Strait reopening first; Trump 'not satisfied'; 15-pt vs 10-pt plans deadlocked; Trump WH Situation Room May1 NSC meeting; Trump says hostilities 'terminated' to Congress (War Powers); ceasefire holding with violations

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: 61% Americans say war mistake (WaPo/ABC/Ipsos); gas .30/gal (up from < pre-war); 13 US KIA + 381 WIA; War Powers 60-day deadline hit May1 — Senate rejected 6th war powers vote but 1st Republican (Collins) defected; Trump declared hostilities terminated unilaterally

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
